commands: npx tsx /private/tmp/nabimd-batch015-orchid-review.mts (419 frozen fixtures + 504 fresh probes)
stopConditions: Any candidate, fixture, engine-contract, verification, or manifest change invalidates this digest-bound evidence and requires a new Orchid review run.
Any reviewer disagreement or editorial rejection blocks publication of the immutable batch.
notes: Independent Orchid mechanical review passed. All 419 frozen fixtures and 504 Orchid-specific probes were evaluated through evaluateProblem. The fresh matrix emphasized Unicode non-CommonMark separators, one-to-three versus four-space indentation, root-container isolation, optional ATX closing runs, tab separators, alternate ordered and unordered markers, H1-H3 hierarchy, exact root-block order, and wording/case neutrality. All 24 candidates have exactly one digest-bound verdict and no ID, content-variant, normalized-target, or vocabulary-signature collision with the 296 published problems.
